name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for Vael
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve?

## Proposed Solution

How should it work?

## Decision Framework Check

Before proposing, verify against [INTENT.md](../../docs/INTENT.md):

- [ ] No unencrypted data leaves the device
- [ ] No server dependency beyond Google Drive
- [ ] No AI/ML — logic is deterministic
- [ ] No forced visibility — user controls sharing
- [ ] No recurring cost for the user
- [ ] No direct bank API connection

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you evaluated.

## Additional Context

Mockups, references, or related issues.
